title: Streamline Master
description: Streamline Master is a Minecraft modpack that boost your performace by huge!
body:
![Streamline Master summary logotype](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6fe4b4a7af16515f83096b4646e10ad471db5cd7.webp)

> ### To play 1.20.5 or 1.20.6 you need to install **[Java 21](https://t.ly/DuYEk)!**
**Do you want to enjoy Minecraft without lag or stuttering? Then the Streamline Master modpack is for you! This carefully curated selection of mods optimizes and enhances your game, giving you a smoother, more enjoyable experience.**

### **_With Streamline Master, you can:_**

- **Enjoy a lag-free experience**
- **Boost your FPS**
- **Reduce your render distance**
- **Optimize your game settings**
- **Enjoy a more immersive experience**

The Streamline Master modpack is easy to install and use. Just download and install the pack, and then launch Minecraft. The mods will be automatically applied and configured.

### **_Here are some of the mods included in the Streamline Master pack:_**

- **BadOptimizations.**
- **FerriteCore.**
- **Lithium.**
- **Very Many Players.**
- **ModernFix.**

### **_The Streamline Master modpack is perfect for:_**

- **Gamers with low-end computers**
- **Gamers who want a smoother, more immersive experience**
- **Gamers who want to boost their FPS**
